name: Richard Hazard
abstract: Richard Hazard (March 2, 1921 – December 20, 2000) was an American television composer, orchestrator, conductor and songwriter. He was born in Trenton, New Jersey, and died in Los Angeles, California, of cancer.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: We had a great staff of musicians there. Beautiful orchestra and great arrangers. There was Dick Hazard, who did most of the conducting.
